title: Minimum Absolute Difference Between Elements With Constraint
titleCn: 限制条件下元素之间的最小绝对差

testcases.input: nums = [4,3,2,4], x = 2 Output: 0 Explanation: We can select nums[0] = 4 and nums[3] = 4. They are at least 2 indices apart, and their absolute difference is the minimum, 0. It can be shown that 0 is the optimal answer.
